channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Penn State fans support Nittany Lions up to the final horn
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (WTAJ) -- One of the best atmosphere's in college hockey recharged one final time Thursday night to support Penn State hockey in the Frozen Four. "We get the added bonus of the season still going on this year, which is really cool," said Roar Zone executive officer Troy Lapolice.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Hughes, Eiserman score 2nd-period goals in Boston U's 3-1 Frozen 4 semifinal win over Penn State
item.description: Jack Hughes and Cole Eiserman scored second-period goals and Boston University beat Penn State 3-1 on Thursday night to advance to its first Frozen Four final in 10 years.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Maine 'MAGA' parent silenced at school board meeting during speech opposing trans athletes in girls' sports
item.description: A school board meeting in Maine featured a hostile interaction between a parent and the school board president over a topic related to trans athlete inclusion in girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Venezuelan NWSL star opts out of national team duty fearing possible return issues
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Portland Thorns forward Deyna Castellanos says she did not play for Venezuela's national team in a pair of recent games because of concerns she might not be able to return to the United States.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC thankful for tremendous fan support
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Although the team was officially eliminated from NHL playoff contention last night, that did not damper the mood before the Utah Hockey Club's final home game of this inaugural season Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Florida's Walter Clayton Jr. recalls final Houston play in title game, admits surprise Cougars didn't get shot
item.description: Florida Gators star Walter Clayton Jr. admitted he was surprised Houston never got a shot off during its final possession of the title game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU lands point guard Robert Wright III from Baylor
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It didn't take long for Kevin Young to find his new point guard. According to multiple reports, Baylor's Robert Wright III is transferring to BYU for his sophomore season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: MLS will give further consideration to adopting a fall-to-spring calendar
item.description: Major League Soccer's Board of Governors will give further consideration to adopting a fall-to-spring calendar, a major move that would align the league with its international counterparts.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Masters whiz kid: Jose Luis Ballester takes a different kind of relief and does No. 1 at No. 13
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — U.S. Amateur champion Jose Luis Ballester had to take a different kind of relief Thursday at the Masters, just not the kind found in the Rules of Golf.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jo Adell becomes first Angels player since 2012 to homer twice in an inning
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Jo Adell's home run drought ended all at once Thursday as he hit two of the Los Angeles Angels' four homers in an eight-run fifth inning against the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler slams home 60-foot birdie putt as he looks to defend his Masters title
item.description: Scottie Scheffler drained a 60-foot par putt on the fourth hole for birdie during the first round of the Masters tournament in Augusta, Georgia, on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: How North Carolina State lineman Anthony Belton fits NFL left tackle prototype, has 18 draft visits
item.description: First-round draft target Anthony Belton is one of the biggest and best offensive tackle prospects and has 18 draft visits
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Islanders minor league player to miss the remainder of the season after shoving referee into the boards
item.description: Adam Beckman has played his final game of the AHL season after he was hit with a 10-game suspension for "physical abuse of an official." The Bridgeport Islanders have just 5 games left.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TWG Motorsports to race coast-to-coast this weekend from NASCAR at Bristol to IndyCar in Long Beach
item.description: LONG BEACH, Calif. (AP) — TWG Motorsports, the controlling owners of several teams in various forms of motorsports, will go coast-to-coast this weekend to showcase its positioning as a powerhouse racing organization.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caitlin Clark talks 'privilege' being White WNBA player, denies feeling targeted because of her race
item.description: Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark, again, claimed she had "privilege" as a White WNBA player but denied feeling she was targeted in the league because of her race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New year, same pain: White Sox have lost 7 straight and are 2-9 for 2nd straight season
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Chicago White Sox were hoping 2025 would be better after they lost 121 games last year, a major league record since 1900. Instead, their pain is continuing in new and unique ways. Chicago's 3-2 loss to Cleveland on Wednesday night was its seventh straight.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: A Florida home with historical ties, including to baseball legend Babe Ruth, hit the market for just under $2 million.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WGN 9

item.title: Erik Karlsson scores his 200th goal as the Penguins beat the Blackhawks 5-0
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Erik Karlsson scored his 200th career goal to help the Pittsburgh Penguins beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-0 on Tuesday night. Sidney Crosby and Kris Letang also scored for Pittsburgh, which lost 3-1 at Chicago on Sunday. Kevin Hayes added two goals in the third period.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: After Masters week began with a day of rain on Monday, Augusta National Golf Club was bathed in sunshine for Tuesday's practice round.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Future uncertain for Duke basketball star due to new Trump policy
item.description: A new visa policy announced by the Trump administration last weekend could impact South Sudanese passport holders, including Duke basketball phenom Khaman Maluach.
item.dc:creator: Keaton Eberly, Fox 5

item.title: Steele tosses 7 innings as the Cubs pound the Rangers 7-0 on frigid night
item.description: Justin Steele tossed three-hit ball over seven innings, and the Chicago Cubs beat the Texas Rangers 7-0 on a frigid Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: (KTLA) -- President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ian Happ plays in 1,000th major league game
item.description: Ian Happ played in his 1,000th major league game on Saturday — all with the Chicago Cubs. It's that last part that makes it special for the outfielder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Fox 5
